raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section foregrounds multiple contribution claims — adaptive online partitioning, unconditional A-stability, O(h^3) order — that require verification of coherent framing and gap justification; these are central to any meaningful review.","R1.2":"A load-bearing logical inconsistency is present: the introduction asserts unconditional A-stability across the full stiffness range, yet the stability analysis establishes |R(z)| ≤ 1 only under the condition h|λ| ≤ 2, and explicitly acknowledges reversion to step-size-restricted ERK behavior beyond this regime — directly contradicting the unconditional claim.","R1.3":"Quantitative benchmark claims (4–7x speedup over fixed-splitting ARK4 at matched accuracy, three test problems) are asserted without methodological detail sufficient to evaluate their support; alignment between these claims and the described evaluation is a primary review concern.","R1.6":"Section review standardly includes prose quality; the text is dense with interleaved technical claims and narrative framing that may trade clarity for compactness, warranting attention regardless of the technical review scope."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize technical and mathematical correctness (logical consistency of stability and order claims, proof structure, claim–result alignment) or editorial quality (prose clarity, narrative flow, writing style)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section foregrounds multiple contribution claims — adaptive online partitioning, unconditional A-stability, O(h^3) order — that require verification of coherent framing and gap justification; these are central to any meaningful review.
rationale.R1.2: A load-bearing logical inconsistency is present: the introduction asserts unconditional A-stability across the full stiffness range, yet the stability analysis establishes |R(z)| ≤ 1 only under the condition h|λ| ≤ 2, and explicitly acknowledges reversion to step-size-restricted ERK behavior beyond this regime — directly contradicting the unconditional claim.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative benchmark claims (4–7x speedup over fixed-splitting ARK4 at matched accuracy, three test problems) are asserted without methodological detail sufficient to evaluate their support; alignment between these claims and the described evaluation is a primary review concern.
rationale.R1.6: Section review standardly includes prose quality; the text is dense with interleaved technical claims and narrative framing that may trade clarity for compactness, warranting attention regardless of the technical review scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize technical and mathematical correctness (logical consistency of stability and order claims, proof structure, claim–result alignment) or editorial quality (prose clarity, narrative flow, writing style)?
